requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — ANOR PECAE Pre-Shipment Conformity and IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 as International Baseline for Cameroon BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——ANOR PECAE装运前合格评定及IEC 62619 / IEC 62133作为喀麦隆BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——ANOR PECAE裝運前合格評定及IEC 62619 / IEC 62133作為喀麥隆BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualité) is Cameroon's national standards body, responsible for developing and adopting technical standards, and administering the PECAE programme (Programme d'Évaluation de la Conformité Avant Embarquement — Pre-Shipment Import Conformity Evaluation). The PECAE programme requires that regulated product categories obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) from an ANOR-approved conformity assessment body before shipment to Cameroon. Exporters must verify whether BESS cells, modules, or complete systems fall within the current PECAE regulated-product scope before shipment — this determination requires direct confirmation with ANOR, as the regulated-product list is subject to periodic revision. ANOR adopts IEC standards as its technical baseline; IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) and IEC 62133 (Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries) are the internationally expected safety standards for lithium BESS cells and modules. Cameroon BESS projects — particularly those financed by donors (World Bank, AfDB, IFC, bilateral donors) or structured as IPPs — are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite in procurement specifications. Bilingual (French and English) technical documentation is required for ANOR submission.
summary.zh: ANOR（国家标准质量局）是喀麦隆的国家标准机构，负责制定和采纳技术标准，并管理PECAE计划（装运前进口合格评定程序）。PECAE计划要求受监管产品类别在出货至喀麦隆前，须从ANOR认可的合格评定机构取得合格证书（CoC）。出口商在出货前须核实BESS电芯、模组或完整系统是否属于现行PECAE受监管产品范围——此认定须直接向ANOR确认，因为受监管产品清单定期修订。ANOR采用IEC标准作为技术基准；IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）和IEC 62133（便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。喀麦隆BESS项目——特别是由捐助方（世界银行、非洲开发银行、IFC、双边捐助方）融资或以IPP模式结构化的项目——预计将在采购规格中以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。提交ANOR的技术文件须以法英双语提供。
summary.zht: ANOR（國家標準質量局）是喀麥隆的國家標準機構，負責制定和採納技術標準，並管理PECAE計劃（裝運前進口合格評定程序）。PECAE計劃要求受監管產品類別在出貨至喀麥隆前，須從ANOR認可的合格評定機構取得合格證書（CoC）。出口商在出貨前須核實BESS電芯、模組或完整系統是否屬於現行PECAE受監管產品範圍——此認定須直接向ANOR確認，因為受監管產品清單定期修訂。ANOR採用IEC標準作為技術基準；IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）和IEC 62133（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。喀麥隆BESS項目——特別是由捐助方（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、IFC、雙邊捐助方）融資或以IPP模式結構化的項目——預計將在採購規格中以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。提交ANOR的技術文件須以法英雙語提供。

standards_or_laws: ANOR PECAE — Programme d'Évaluation de la Conformité Avant Embarquement (Pre-Shipment Import Conformity Evaluation — Certificate of Conformity required for regulated product categories before shipment to Cameroon; verify whether BESS cells/modules/systems are in current scope directly with ANOR)

IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Cameroon donor and IPP project specifications)
IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (ANOR IEC-aligned technical baseline for lithium cells and batteries)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard expected in ARSEL licensing and project specifications)
ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualité (Cameroon national standards body — verify current regulated product list and PECAE scope directly)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 or IEC 62133 and are not accepted as equivalents in ANOR PECAE conformity assessment or in Cameroon donor and IPP project specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 and — where required by project specifications — IEC 62133 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. Technical documentation for ANOR PECAE submission must be provided in bilingual French and English.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619或IEC 62133协调，不被ANOR PECAE合格评定或喀麦隆捐助方和IPP项目规格接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619以及——在项目规格有要求时——IEC 62133型式试验证书。提交ANOR PECAE的技术文件须以法英双语提供。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619或IEC 62133協調，不被ANOR PECAE合格評定或喀麥隆捐助方和IPP項目規格接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619以及——在項目規格有要求時——IEC 62133型式試驗證書。提交ANOR PECAE的技術文件須以法英雙語提供。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: ANOR PECAE pre-shipment conformity assessment and donor/IPP project specifications reference IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules in Cameroon. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 or IEC 62133 and are not accepted as substitutes in ANOR PECAE assessment or project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify directly with ANOR whether BESS cells, modules, or systems currently fall within the PECAE regulated-product scope and what CoC documentation is required before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Cameroon BESS projects; (c) where project specifications require IEC 62133 compliance, obtain the relevant IEC 62133 test evidence; (d) prepare bilingual French and English technical documentation for ANOR PECAE submission; (e) for donor or DFI-financed projects, review the project procurement specifications and lender technical requirements to confirm whether additional internationally accredited test evidence (e.g. IEC 62619 from a specific accreditation body) is required; (f) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：ANOR PECAE装运前合格评定及捐助方/IPP项目规格将IEC 62619和IEC 62133作为喀麦隆BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619或IEC 62133协调，不被ANOR PECAE评定或项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）直接向ANOR核实BESS电芯、模组或系统目前是否属于PECAE受监管产品范围，以及出货前须提供哪些CoC文件；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至喀麦隆BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）若项目规格要求IEC 62133合规，取得相关IEC 62133测试证据；（d）为ANOR PECAE申请准备法英双语技术文件；（e）对于捐助方或DFI融资项目，审阅项目采购规格和贷款方技术要求，确认是否需要额外的国际认可测试证据（如来自特定认可机构的IEC 62619）；（f）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格中引用的IEC 62619版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：ANOR PECAE裝運前合格評定及捐助方/IPP項目規格將IEC 62619和IEC 62133作為喀麥隆BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619或IEC 62133協調，不被ANOR PECAE評定或項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）直接向ANOR核實BESS電芯、模組或系統目前是否屬於PECAE受監管產品範圍，以及出貨前須提供哪些CoC文件；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至喀麥隆BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）若項目規格要求IEC 62133合規，取得相關IEC 62133測試證據；（d）為ANOR PECAE申請準備法英雙語技術文件；（e）對於捐助方或DFI融資項目，審閱項目採購規格和貸款方技術要求，確認是否需要額外的國際認可測試證據（如來自特定認可機構的IEC 62619）；（f）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格中引用的IEC 62619版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory pre-shipment conformity (PECAE CoC) for any BESS cells/modules/systems within ANOR PECAE regulated-product scope — verify current scope directly with ANOR before shipment; IEC 62619 mandatory in project practice where donor or IPP project specifications require it
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: ANOR — Agence des Normes et de la Qualité (Cameroon national standards body and PECAE programme administrator)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ANOR PECAE pre-shipment conformity may be mandatory for BESS cells, modules, or systems if they fall within the current regulated-product scope — verify directly with ANOR before shipment. IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 are the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Cameroon donor and IPP project specifications. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for ANOR PECAE assessment or project acceptance in Cameroon. Prepare bilingual French and English technical documentation. Verify ANOR current regulated-product scope, confirm IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 evidence requirements with the project owner and ANOR, and review donor or DFI lender technical requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若BESS电芯、模组或系统属于现行受监管产品范围，ANOR PECAE装运前合格评定可能为强制要求——出货前须直接向ANOR核实。IEC 62619和IEC 62133是喀麦隆捐助方和IPP项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足ANOR PECAE评定或喀麦隆项目验收要求。须准备法英双语技术文件。出货前请核实ANOR现行受监管产品范围，向项目业主和ANOR确认IEC 62619和IEC 62133证据要求，并审阅捐助方或DFI贷款方技术要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若BESS電芯、模組或系統屬於現行受監管產品範圍，ANOR PECAE裝運前合格評定可能為強制要求——出貨前須直接向ANOR核實。IEC 62619和IEC 62133是喀麥隆捐助方和IPP項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足ANOR PECAE評定或喀麥隆項目驗收要求。須準備法英雙語技術文件。出貨前請核實ANOR現行受監管產品範圍，向項目業主和ANOR確認IEC 62619和IEC 62133證據要求，並審閱捐助方或DFI貸款方技術要求。
